fields.description: URL slug for this site (e.g. my-restaurant). Used in /t/[slug]
fields.name: slug

fields.description: Arabic name for the business (e.g. for driver push notifications and RTL display).
fields.name: name_ar
fields.title: Business Name (Arabic)

fields.description: Required for delivery: used to manage and share drivers by area.
fields.name: country

fields.description: Required for delivery: used to manage and share drivers in this city.
fields.name: city

fields.description: GPS latitude of the business location. Used by drivers and customers to navigate here. Set via "Share Location" in the business settings.
fields.name: locationLat
fields.title: Business latitude

fields.description: GPS longitude of the business location.
fields.name: locationLng
fields.title: Business longitude

fields.description: Optional. A business can have multiple specialties (e.g. Burgers, Sandwiches, Pizza). Only sub-categories for the selected Business Type are shown.
fields.name: businessSubcategories
fields.title: Sub-categories (Specialties)

fields.description: If enabled, WhatsApp notifications will be sent instantly for new orders instead of waiting 3 minutes.
fields.name: prioritizeWhatsapp
fields.title: Prioritize WhatsApp

fields.description: Delivery fees use distance-based pricing.
fields.name: deliveryPricingMode

fields.description: Minimum fee for distance-based delivery (e.g. 10).
fields.name: deliveryFeeMin
fields.title: Minimum Delivery Fee

fields.description: Maximum fee for distance-based delivery (e.g. 25).
fields.name: deliveryFeeMax
fields.title: Maximum Delivery Fee

fields.description: Distance at which the fee reaches the maximum (e.g. 15).
fields.name: deliveryMaxDistanceKm
fields.title: Maximum Distance (km) for Fee Scaling

fields.description: Owner: Clerk user ID who created this tenant
fields.name: clerkUserId
fields.title: Clerk User ID

fields.description: Primary owner email from Clerk. Set automatically when creating a tenant from the app (onboarding or Super Admin). Used for display and for dashboard/access by email.
fields.name: clerkUserEmail
fields.title: Owner Email

fields.description: Owner’s mobile/WhatsApp number. Required at signup so the tenant can place orders without Clerk phone verification. Stored in E.164 or with country code (e.g. +972501234567).
fields.name: ownerPhone

fields.description: Digits-only form for matching when placing orders. Set automatically.
fields.name: normalizedOwnerPhone
fields.title: Normalized owner phone (digits)

fields.description: Other people who can manage this business (store lowercase). Same access as primary owner.
fields.name: coOwnerEmails
fields.title: Additional owner emails

fields.description: basic | pro | ultra. Trial = ultra for 30 days. Set when tenant pays via BOP.
fields.name: subscriptionPlan
fields.title: Subscription Plan Tier

fields.description: Set when the business profile (restaurantInfo) is first submitted. Used to start the 30-day trial.
fields.name: businessCreatedAt

fields.description: Tracks when the last FCM expiration reminder was sent to avoid spamming.
fields.name: lastSubscriptionReminderAt
fields.title: Last subscription reminder sent at

fields.description: End of 30-day trial (from site creation) or paid period. Business is hidden from customers when past this date. Set to createdAt + 30 days on create; extended when tenant subscribes or pays.
fields.name: subscriptionExpiresAt
fields.title: Subscription expires at

fields.description: Stored when tenant approves a PayPal recurring subscription. Used for webhooks to extend on each billing cycle.
fields.name: paypalSubscriptionId
fields.title: PayPal subscription ID

fields.description: Set when subscription is extended (approve or webhook). Used for display (last payment date).
fields.name: subscriptionLastPaymentAt
fields.title: Last subscription payment at

fields.description: When true, the business is temporarily hidden (menu unavailable) until re-enabled or until deactivateUntil.
fields.name: deactivated

fields.description: Optional. When set, the business will automatically become active again at this date and time (like product availability).
fields.name: deactivateUntil
fields.title: Re-enable at (date & time)

fields.description: Default language for your business dashboard (manage pages). Does not change the customer menu language.
fields.name: defaultLanguage
fields.title: Default language (dashboard)

fields.description: When catalog mode is active (no delivery, no pickup, no dine-in), hide all product prices.
fields.name: catalogHidePrices
fields.title: Hide Prices in Catalog Mode

fields.description: When on, customers can choose "Dine-in" (table) when ordering. When off, only Receive in Person and Delivery (if you have delivery areas) are shown.
fields.name: supportsDineIn
fields.title: Accept Dine-in orders

fields.description: When on, customers can choose "Receive in Person" (pickup). When off with Dine-in off and no delivery, the menu acts as a catalog only (no Add to Cart).
fields.name: supportsReceiveInPerson
fields.title: Accept Receive in Person (pickup) orders

fields.description: When on and you have at least one delivery area, customers see the Delivery option. When off, customers never see Delivery even if you have areas. When on but no delivery areas, Delivery is still hidden until you add areas.
fields.name: supportsDelivery
fields.title: Offer Delivery

fields.description: Used in Order list preview to identify the business. Synced from Business Info when you save there, or set here in Studio.
fields.name: businessLogo
fields.title: Business logo

fields.description: Web Push subscription for new order notifications (set when tenant enables push on orders page).
fields.name: pushSubscription
fields.title: Push subscription

fields.description: Legacy: single FCM token. Prefer fcmTokens for multi-device support.
fields.name: fcmToken
fields.title: FCM token (legacy single)

fields.description: One FCM token per device. When a device enables notifications, its token is added here so all devices receive new order and table-request notifications.
fields.name: fcmTokens
fields.title: FCM tokens (all devices)

fields.description: Super admin only: when true, this business cannot access the control panel or receive new orders. They cannot override this.
fields.name: blockedBySuperAdmin
fields.title: Blocked by Super Admin

fields.description: When enabled, the driver collects items at the store (e.g. supermarkets, greengrocers) instead of receiving a pre-packed order. A shopper fee is added to delivery orders.
fields.name: requiresPersonalShopper

fields.description: Fee added to delivery orders when Requires Personal Shopper is enabled. Displayed as a time-saving service for the customer.
fields.name: shopperFee
fields.title: Personal Shopper Fee (ILS)

fields.description: Which business/site this belongs to
fields.name: site

fields.description: How products are ordered in this category on the customer menu. Manual = use sortOrder.
fields.name: productSortMode
fields.title: Product sort mode

fields.description: Optional. Links this menu section to a business sub-category for better search and discovery. Set when picking from suggestions.
fields.name: subcategoryRef
fields.title: Sub-category (for search)

fields.description: e.g. Coca Cola, Tnuva, Osem
fields.name: brand
fields.title: Brand (optional)

fields.description: Product images. Tenants can contribute new images when adding this product to their menu.
fields.name: images

fields.description: How this product is typically sold. Used when tenants add from catalog.
fields.name: defaultUnit
fields.title: Default sale unit

fields.description: When set, this image is used for quick-add. Otherwise Unsplash is used with the search query.
fields.name: image
fields.title: Product Image (optional)

fields.description: Required when no image is uploaded. Used to fetch from Unsplash (e.g. "carton of eggs").
fields.name: searchQuery
fields.title: Image Search Query

fields.description: Which business/site this belongs to
fields.name: site

fields.description: When set, this product came from the catalog. Tenant can override name, image, and price.
fields.name: catalogRef
fields.title: Catalog Product (optional)

fields.description: When set, this product was quick-added from the master catalog.
fields.name: masterCatalogRef
fields.title: Master Catalog Product (optional)

fields.description: By default all products are available. Turn off when sold out (e.g. ran out of chicken tenders). Set when it will be back.
fields.name: isAvailable
fields.title: Available

fields.description: When this product will be available again. Options: 1 hour, until next opening, or custom date & time.
fields.name: availableAgainAt
fields.title: Available again at

fields.description: Base price. Use 0 for free items or when price is determined by variants.
fields.name: price

fields.description: Hide this specific product's price when the menu is in catalog mode.
fields.name: hidePrice
fields.title: Hide Price in Catalog Mode

fields.description: Optional sale price
fields.name: specialPrice

fields.description: When the special price should stop being displayed
fields.name: specialPriceExpires
fields.title: Special Price Expires At

fields.description: How this item is sold (piece, per kg, per bottle, etc.)
fields.name: saleUnit
fields.title: Sold by

fields.description: Fallback temporary URL before image is uploaded to assets.
fields.name: tempImageUrl
fields.title: Temporary image URL (optional)

fields.description: Additional images that will show on hover (second image will be used for hover effect)
fields.name: additionalImages

fields.description: Optional add-ons for this product (e.g., "Chicken" +5 ILS)
Price to add (0 for free add-on)
fields.name: price
addOns
fields.title: Add-ons

fields.description: Option groups (e.g. Size, Make it a Meal). Mark "Required" only when the customer must pick one; leave unchecked for optional groups like meal upgrades.
e.g. Size, Color
fields.name: name_en
fields.title: Group name (English)

fields.description: If unchecked, the customer can add the product without choosing from this group (e.g. "Make it a Meal" is optional).
fields.name: required

fields.description: Added to base price (e.g. +5 for Large). Use 0 for no change. When base price is 0, this is the option price.
fields.name: priceModifier
fields.title: Price modifier

fields.description: Optional sale price for this option. When set and not expired, used instead of Price modifier.
fields.name: specialPriceModifier
fields.title: Special price modifier

fields.description: When the special price for this option should stop being used.
fields.name: specialPriceModifierExpires
fields.title: Special price expires at

fields.description: Optional. When the customer selects this option, this image is shown instead of the product image (e.g. color swatch).
fields.name: image
fields.title: Option image

fields.description: When checked, this option is pre-selected when the customer opens the product. Only one option per group should be default.
fields.name: isDefault
fields.title: Default option

fields.name: variants

fields.description: Which business/site this belongs to
fields.name: site

fields.description: Used for PWA icon and manifest. Recommended for new businesses.
fields.name: logo

fields.description: Link to open your location in Google Maps or Apple Maps (e.g. from Share in Google Maps). When set, the "Visit us" section is shown with this link.
fields.name: mapsLink
fields.title: Maps link (optional)

fields.description: How to get it: 1) Open Google Maps and find your location. 2) Click Share → Embed a map. 3) Copy the iframe code, then paste either the full iframe HTML or just the src URL (the part inside src="..."). When set, an embedded map is shown on your menu page.
fields.name: mapEmbedUrl
fields.title: Embed Google Maps (optional)

fields.description: Phone number with country code (e.g. 972501234567). Used for "Contact us" link.
fields.name: whatsapp
fields.title: WhatsApp Number

fields.description: Hours per day (index 0 = Sunday, 6 = Saturday). Empty open/close = closed that day.
Optional: specify multiple opening periods for this day (e.g., 09:00-14:00, 18:00-23:00)
fields.name: shifts
fields.title: Multiple Shifts

fields.name: openingHours
fields.title: Opening & Closing Hours

fields.description: Override hours for specific dates (e.g. holidays).
Optional: specify multiple opening periods for this date
fields.name: shifts
fields.title: Multiple Shifts

fields.name: customDateHours
fields.title: Custom hours (specific dates)

fields.description: Choose the sound that plays when a new order is received on the Orders page. Click "Play" to preview each sound.
fields.name: notificationSound
fields.title: Order Notification Sound

fields.description: Which business/site this belongs to
fields.name: site

description: Platform-level city boundaries for geofencing. Editable in Admin Areas map.

fields.description: City identifier used in geofencing (e.g. Bethany, Jerusalem)
fields.name: name
fields.title: City Name

fields.description: JSON array of [longitude, latitude] pairs forming the polygon ring. Closed ring (first point = last point).
fields.name: coordinates
fields.title: Polygon Coordinates

name: platformArea

fields.description: Legacy: if set, driver was created by this tenant. New drivers use country/city and are shared.

fields.description: Country (e.g. PS, IL). Drivers are shared with tenants in the same country and city.

fields.description: City name. Used for “drivers in your area” quick-add.

fields.description: Set when driver joins via “Join as a driver”; links profile to their account.

fields.description: Name to display (e.g. for orders). Leave empty to use full name.

fields.description: Phone number with country code (e.g., +972501234567)
